member.name: T:PulseDesk.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles any user authentication or authorization (Login, Registration and Role Management)

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.AuthController.#ctor(PulseDesk.Data.AppDbContext,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Handles any user authentication or authorization (Login, Registration and Role Management)

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.AuthController.Register(PulseDesk.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Registers a user to the system and returns a success message. Users always are registered as a Customer by default (Admins can change the role of a user later)
member.param: The request object coming from the client
member.response: Allows the user to register
If the user is not found/Authorized

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.AuthController.Login(PulseDesk.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Logs the user into the system and returns a JWT token for authentication
member.param: The request object coming from the client
member.response: Allows the user to login
If the user is not found/Authorized

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.AuthController.UpdateRole(System.Int32,PulseDesk.DTOs.Auth.UpdateRoleRequest)
member.summary: Updates the role of a user (Only an Admin can change a user's role)
member.param: The unique identifier for the user that will be changed
The request body coming from the client
member.response: Returns a success response for user's role change
If the user is not found/Authorized

member.name: T:PulseDesk.Controllers.CommentsController
member.summary: Endpoints for managing comments that are related to tickets. Users can create a comment for a ticket. Admins can delete any comment.

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.CommentsController.#ctor(PulseDesk.Data.AppDbContext)
member.summary: Endpoints for managing comments that are related to tickets. Users can create a comment for a ticket. Admins can delete any comment.

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.CommentsController.GetAll(System.Int32)
member.summary: Fetchs comments from a specific ticket
member.param: The unique identifier for the ticket.
member.response: Returns the ticket's comments
If the user is not found/Authorized

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.CommentsController.Create(System.Int32,PulseDesk.DTOs.Comments.CreateCommentRequest)
member.summary: Creates a comment for a specific ticket
member.param: The unique identifier for the ticket.
member.response: Returns the ticket's comments
If the user is not found/Authorized

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.CommentsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a comment for a specific ticket
member.param: The unique identifier for the ticket
The unique identifier for the comment
member.response: Returns the ticket's comments
If the user is not found/Authorized

member.name: T:PulseDesk.Controllers.DashboardController
member.summary: Dashboard controller provides endpoints for statistics for PulseDesk. Only accessible through Admins and Agents (Privacy amongst costumers)

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.DashboardController.#ctor(PulseDesk.Data.AppDbContext)
member.summary: Dashboard controller provides endpoints for statistics for PulseDesk. Only accessible through Admins and Agents (Privacy amongst costumers)

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.DashboardController.GetStats
member.summary: Fetch the overall stats for the current tickets in the system. A High level overview of the system.
member.returns: A success response with an object defining all tickets, number of assigned tickets, resolved tickts, statuses and priorities
member.response: Agent work load was pulled successfully

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.DashboardController.GetAgentWorkLoad
member.summary: Fetch the workload of agents. Helpful to know if there's backlogs.
member.returns: A agentWorkload Response - consists of all agents, any open tickets, in progress, resolve and total assigned tickets
member.response: Agent work load was pulled successfully

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.DashboardController.GetRecentActivity
member.summary: Get the most recent activity done on the system. This includes recent tickets created and recent updates on tickets
member.response: Allows the user to view the most recent tickets/activity

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.DashboardController.GetUsers
member.summary: Fetch a list of all users in the system, their role and how many tickets they have raised or assigned to them. This is useful for Admins to manage users and see the workload of each user.
member.response: Fetched the users in the system

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.DashboardController.DeleteUser(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a user in the system. Only Admins can delete users.
member.response: Deleted the user successfully
No User found that matches that specific id

member.name: T:PulseDesk.Controllers.TicketsController
member.summary: Tickets are the bread and butter for PulseDesk, tickets are the issues a customer will point out. Customers can create tickets, view their own tickets and see the status of their tickets. Agents can view all tickets, update the status, priority and assignment of a ticket. Admins have all the permissions of agents and can also delete tickets.

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.TicketsController.#ctor(PulseDesk.Data.AppDbContext)
member.summary: Tickets are the bread and butter for PulseDesk, tickets are the issues a customer will point out. Customers can create tickets, view their own tickets and see the status of their tickets. Agents can view all tickets, update the status, priority and assignment of a ticket. Admins have all the permissions of agents and can also delete tickets.

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.TicketsController.GetAll
member.summary: Fetches all the tickets in the system. Customers can only see their own tickets, Agents and Admins can see all the tickets.
member.remarks:
Sample request:
GET api/tickets Only customers can see their own tickets Agents and admins can see all the tickets
member.response: Allows the user to view the comments

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.TicketsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Fetches a ticket by it's id
member.response: Allows the user to view the specific ticket

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.TicketsController.Create(PulseDesk.DTOs.Tickets.CreateTicketRequest)
member.summary: Only Customers can create tickets
member.response: Ticket Created successfully

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.TicketsController.Update(System.Int32,PulseDesk.DTOs.Tickets.UpdateTicketRequest)
member.summary: Only Agents and Admins can update the ticket status, priority and assignment
member.response: Ticket was updated successfully
Unauthorized to perform an update
Could not find the ticket to update

member.name: M:PulseDesk.Controllers.TicketsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Only Agents and Admins can update the ticket status, priority and assignment
member.param: The Ticket's id that will be deleted
member.response: Ticket was updated successfully
Could not find the ticket to update

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
